title: FolderBot Job
description: Execution contract written by the agent/SessionBot for script execution jobs.

job_id.description: Unique job identifier within the session. Format: job-001, job-002, ...

status.description: pending: waiting for runner. running: claimed by runner. success/failed: terminal.

entrypoint.description: Filename of the script to execute (.py or .ps1). Relative to the job folder.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum execution time. Runner kills the process if exceeded.

expected_outputs.description: Session-relative paths the script is expected to produce.
